title: Super Soft Sherpa Throw Blanket Watercolor Floral Mixed Colors Reversible Fleece Flannel Throw 150 x 100 cm Cosy Winter Bed Sofa Blanket Machine Washable Warm Beige
features: What You Get: flannel throw blanket Size of this blanket 150 x 100 cm (59" x 39.3"), bring you additional warm and comfort experience whether you rest in the airplane, nap on the sofa or camping picnic. So don't wait any longer, just own it right away

Supreme Softness and Comfort: Designed with flannel on the top and extremely soft Sherpa on the reverse side, this double-sided cosy blanket is perfect by itself or as an extra layer on cold nights, this blanket provides a plush and cosy feel that is perfect for snuggling on the sofa or adding an extra layer of warmth to your bed, ensuring ultimate comfort all year round

Durable and Long-Lasting: Constructed with high-quality stitching and fade-resistant materials, this blanket is built to withstand repeated use and washing, maintaining its softness and vibrant colours for years to come, making it a reliable addition to your home

Decorative: With the velvet touch softness and elegant designs,the blanket features a double-faced plush with graceful luster, and the stylish jacquard pattern offers a unique silhouette and modern look. Easily enhances or coordinates your living home decorative

Easy Care and Maintenance: This blanket is machine washable and quick-drying, allowing for hassle-free cleaning. It retains its luxurious texture and shape even after multiple washes, ensuring that it remains as soft and inviting as the first day you used it
description: where we offer more than just a product; we deliver warmth and care. This thoughtfully designed blanket embodies our commitment to comfort and quality, making it the perfect addition to your home. Perfect Size for Versatile Use The dimensions of this blanket are: 80 x 120 cm (31.4" x 47"); 150 x 100 cm (59" x 39.3"); 150 x 200 cm (59" x 78.7"); 220 x 240 cm (86.6" x 94.4"); 220 x 260 cm (86.6" x 102"). These blanket sizes can be used in a variety of scenarios. Supreme Softness and Comfort This blanket is made of soft flannel. Whether you're curling up on the sofa or enjoying a good night's sleep in bed, this blanket provides a comforting embrace that will keep you warm throughout the year. It’s the perfect companion for any season, offering unparalleled softness and warmth. Elegant Design for Stylish Home Decor Not only practical, but this blanket also brings a touch of sophistication to your home. Its velvet-like texture and chic jacquard pattern add a stylish flair to your living space. Whether draped over your sofa or spread across your bed, it enhances your home decor with a modern and elegant look. Easy Care for Long-Lasting Softness Maintaining this blanket is a breeze—simply machine wash and tumble dry. It retains its plush texture and shape, even after multiple washes, so it always feels as soft and inviting as the first day you used it. Dedicated Customer Service Your satisfaction is our top priority. If you have any questions or concerns after your purchase, please don't hesitate to contact us. We are committed to providing prompt and friendly support, ensuring a delightful shopping experience. Order now and add this comforting blanket to your home, ready to provide warmth and style whenever you need it.
